body: PROPOSAL: System Optimization & Expansion. 1. Technical: Implement parallel scanning via rayon and refine classification patterns. 2. Governance: Automate real-time drift detection against constitutional_constraints.yaml. 3. Features: Implement dynamic root management UI and advanced INDEX.md metadata. Seeking feedback on priority and implementation order.

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: subject; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "to" value "broadcast" not in allowed values: archivist, library, swarmmind, kernel; task_kind is required for task/response/escalation/handoff messages
